global.description: The ad features a dark background with food delivery icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery services at a special price.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that provides contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: food delivery icons
elements.description: Three stylized food delivery icons arranged in a row, representing various food items.

elements.label: food delivery icons
elements.description: Another set of three stylized food delivery icons, similar in style to the previous ones.

elements.label: food delivery icons
elements.description: A third set of three stylized food delivery icons, maintaining the same design theme.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with rounded edges that reads 'Get offer' in bold text.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A bold price tag displaying '$4.99' in a large, eye-catching font.

elements.label: cravings message
elements.description: A clear and inviting message stating 'Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby' in a friendly font.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fresh favorites nearby $4.99 Get offer

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' displayed in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in the corner that reads 'SALE' in bold, contrasting text.
